faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Questions, concerns, and inquiries managed by our users
faq.a1: Inventra is an AI-powered tool that helps you create optimized e-commerce listings in seconds, saving you hours of work.
faq.a2: Inventra is designed for e-commerce sellers who need to create quick, clear, and optimized listings for platforms like Mercado Libre, Facebook Marketplace, and more.
faq.a3: Just enter your product's basic information and our AI automatically generates an optimized listing for the platform where you want to sell.
faq.q4: Can I use it even without an e-commerce store?
faq.a4: Yes. You don't need your own e-commerce store. Inventra works for anyone who needs to create listings to sell products on online platforms.
faq.q5: What sets us apart from the competition?
faq.a5: Inventra is specifically designed to create e-commerce listings. It uses optimized formats, proven sales structures, and up-to-date platform data to generate ready-to-publish listings.
faq.q6: What types of plans does Inventra offer?
faq.a6: Inventra is specifically designed to create e-commerce listings. It uses optimized formats, proven sales structures, and up-to-date platform data to generate ready-to-publish listings.
faq.a7: Yes, while we serve global clients, Inventra is designed with special attention to popular platforms in Mexico and Latin America.
